## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Build / CI

## Validation

- [ ] `cd src-tauri && cargo test`
- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `scripts/check-repo-boundaries.sh` (no Pro/Cloud leakage)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](../DCO.md).
- [ ] I have **not** included proprietary PortBay Cloud/Pro code.
- [ ] I have **not** included secrets, credentials, tokens, keys, private
      endpoints, or customer data.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I have updated docs where needed.
- [ ] My contribution is licensed under the applicable repo license
      (**AGPL-3.0-only**).
- [ ] I ran the required local checks above.
- [ ] Atomic scope — unrelated changes kept out.
- [ ] New capabilities, sidecars, or network calls are justified.
